summary.key_theme: 儘管股價近期經歷大幅回調，市場仍高度看好 Palantir 在 AI 領域的長期成長潛力與 AIP 平台的強勁採用率。

bullish.title: As Palantir Stock Plunges 32%, Is It Time to Buy the Dip in PLTR?
bullish.reason: 分析師強調 AIP 平台需求強勁、美國商業業務與政府部門表現穩健，認為股價回調提供了買入機會。

bullish.title: Did ARK’s Buying, Trump’s Praise and AIP Adoption Just Recast Palantir Technologies’ (PLTR) Investment Narrative?
bullish.reason: ARK Invest 增持、政治人物正面評價以及 AIP 平台的廣泛採用，共同強化了公司的投資敘事。

bullish.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Palantir Technologies
bullish.reason: 強調在經歷技術性修正後，Palantir 憑藉 AI 驅動的成長與營收預測上調，正接近潛在的突破點。

bullish.title: Michael Burry Will Be 'Proved Emphatically Wrong' on Palantir, Says Wedbush.
bullish.reason: Wedbush 反駁了 Michael Burry 的看空觀點，並重申對公司 Q4 財報表現與未來成長的信心。

bullish.title: At 175x Earnings, Palantir Isn't Really As Expensive As It Looks
bullish.reason: 論證市場正將 Palantir 定價為 AI 時代的基礎設施公司，高本益比反映了其長期成長溢價。

bearish.title: Palantir Insider Selling Raises Questions On Valuation And Growth Story
bearish.reason: 包含共同創辦人在內的大規模內部人拋售股票，引發市場對公司估值過高及成長故事是否持續的疑慮。

bearish.title: Palantir Sees Target Cut to $185 by Mizuho: Is the AI Darling Losing Its Luster?
bearish.reason: Mizuho 將目標價下調至 $185，儘管維持「優於大盤」評級，但下調目標價仍對短期股價情緒造成壓力。

bearish.title: Shorting Palantir or Inuit: Which One Makes Sense Right Now?
bearish.reason: 討論做空 Palantir 的可行性，反映出市場中存在部分投資人對其高估值的質疑。

neutral.title: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 僅為市場關注度分析，未提供具體的買賣建議或基本面變動。

neutral.title: Comparing Palantir Technologies With Industry Competitors In Software Industry
neutral.reason: 例行性的產業競爭力比較，屬於中性市場資訊。
